title: rubus × horrendus
intro: Rubus × horrendus, also known as the hybrid black raspberry or black raspberry, is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the Himalayan blackberry (Rubus armeniacus), resulting in a unique and potent plant with remarkable properties. The medicinal properties of Rubus × horrendus include its high content of ellagic acid, anthocyanins, and other antioxidants, which have been shown to possess anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and anticancer properties. The health benefits of consuming Rubus × horrendus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and protect against certain cancers, as well as its ability to support immune function and antioxidant defenses. Rubus × horrendus can be prepared as a tea, juice, or supplement, or used in traditional herbal remedies, such as tinctures, salves, and infusions, to harness its medicinal properties and reap its health benefits.
